title: Buttery Light Ukrainian Beef Skewers
description: Succulent beef cubes glazed with a fragrant butterherb mixture, grilled to perfection and finished with fresh dill for a lowsodium, festive treat.

ingredients.name: Beef sirloin, mixed cuts (sirloin, strip, ribeye)

instructions: Whisk melted butter, dill, parsley, garlic, lemon zest, paprika, low-sodium soy sauce, olive oil, and pepper in a bowl.
Add beef cubes, toss to coat, cover, and refrigerate for 30‑120 minutes.
Preheat grill to medium‑high (180–200 °C / 350–400 °F). Optionally add soaked wood chips for smoke.
Thread 5‑6 beef cubes onto metal or soaked wooden skewers.
While grilling, brush remaining butter glaze onto the skewers.
Cook 3–4 minutes per side, turning occasionally, until seared and internal temp reaches 130 °F (54 °C) for medium‑rare.
Remove from grill, let rest 5 minutes.
Sprinkle with extra dill before serving.
